custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM BatchPlannerLog JOIN BatchPlannerPlan ON BatchPlannerLog.batchPlannerPlanId = BatchPlannerPlan.batchPlannerPlanId WHERE (BatchPlannerLog.companyId = ?) AND (BatchPlannerPlan.export = ?)

SELECT BatchPlannerLog.* FROM BatchPlannerLog JOIN BatchPlannerPlan ON BatchPlannerLog.batchPlannerPlanId = BatchPlannerPlan.batchPlannerPlanId WHERE (BatchPlannerLog.companyId = ?) AND (BatchPlannerPlan.export = ?)
